title: Jambojet%20RPA%20Case%20Study
content:
CASE STUD Y
REVENUE RECONCILIATION FOR AN AIRLINE 
THROUGH  ROBOTIC PROCESS AUTOMATION 
/parenleft.capRPA/parenright.cap


Jambojet is a progressive, low cost Airline, based in Kenya, currently operating routes 
in East Africa and is rapidly expanding into Central and West Africa.
As part of its digital strategy, it engaged Techno Brain to help it automate its revenue 
reconciliation, as well as Flight check-in and booking through AI and Robotics. 
In this case study, we showcase how Jambojet was able to streamline its revenue 
reconciliation. This was achieved through an Artiﬁcially Intelligent Chatbot with back 
end process robots, in a customised AI offering by Techno Brain known as Techno 
Brain Probotics.COMPANY PROFILE
Private Transportaion Nairobi, Kenya TransportationCompany Type Industry Headquarters Services
The need to perform ticket revenue reconciliation from 50+ Agents globally, from 
various channels – Mobile, Card and Cash, and to post the same in the Airline’s ERP. 
The process prior to the automation was painstakingly manual, cumulatively taking in 
excess of 12 hours each day. Further, there was little management visibility on the 
reconciliation status for each ticket Agency.PROBLEM STATEMENT Leading Low Cost Airline in Kenya

BENEFITS
Probotics has enabled Jambojet to reduce its revenue reconciliation from 12 hours 
to less than 1 hour for its 50+ ticketing centres globally. Other beneﬁts includes 
increased transparency of revenue collections, Anywhere Access, and Multi 
Channel communication.
SOLUTIONS
